summary: Network device failed one or more compliance controls
__comment: Scoped by the managed_by TAG, not by device. Any tagged device is covered the instant it is discovered - nothing to update when hardware changes. Backed by a log metric on compliance.failed_count.

eventTemplate.title: Compliance drift on {dims:net_role} device
eventTemplate.description: A device tagged managed_by=ansible-caac failed a control. See compliance bucket.
